title: chabash #2280
definition:
1) to tie, bind, bind on, bind up, saddle, restrain, bandage, govern
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to bind, bind on
        1a2) to bind up
    1b) (Piel) to bind, restrain
    1c) (Pual) to be bound up
